title: FileHistorySnapshot
description: Snapshot of tracked file backups at a given point in the transcript. Consumed by the diff viewer to show what the assistant changed.

messageId.description: Message ID associated with this snapshot.

trackedFileBackups.description: Map of absolute file paths to backup metadata.

backupFileName.description: Absolute path of the backup file, or null when the file did not exist in this version.

version.description: Monotonic version number for this file.
